title: Attack on Dantooine (disambiguation)
content:
'''Attack on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]''' can refer to:
*'''[[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|Attack on Dantooine]]''', an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of the planet by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]].
*'''[[Attack on Dantooine (Galactic Civil War)|Attack on Dantooine]]''', also called the '''Dantooine Massacre''', was a terrorist act by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]].
*See also: [[Battle of Dantooine]]
{{Disambig}}
